texto: I am a Beacon of Light. I attract so many different kinds of people from all walks of life. Like a moth to a flame. Different ages,different races, different genders,different social classes,the homeless,the mentally disabled and addicts. So you have to excuse me when I turn off my porch light. Cause that is the time I find peace in the darkness.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a ricky star: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I am a Beacon of Light. I attract so many different kinds of people from all walks of life. Like …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, thought-provoking, different pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao-noturna.

texto: Camera's are everywhere, the walls have eyes the sidewalks have eyes. Nothing completely happens without someone knowing about it.
explicacao: Citação de ricky star sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Camera's are everywhere, the walls have eyes the sidewalks have eyes. Nothing completely happens …” articula reflexao, thought-provoking, camera em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
